comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 fan-out, shape A (dict->str). Transcribed verbatim from scraper_classicfirearms.py inline CALIBER_PATHS on 2026-06-14, parity-proven byte-identical before flip. Magento store, pure SSR; per-caliber pages are paginated by the scraper with ?p=N. .38 Special (/38-special/) and .357 (/357/) are SEPARATE dedicated single-caliber pages — NOT a gritr-style mixed page — so there is no per-URL title_filter here. The scraper's runtime _title_names_caliber() dual-caliber honesty guard (CF cross-lists .38 ammo on the .357 page and vice-versa) is unrelated scraping LOGIC and stays in the scraper untouched. 7.62x39 uses the hyphenated slug; the unhyphenated variant 404s. Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 fan-out (option a), 2026-06-14.
